files.name: Trolling-Addon-v1.0.0.mcaddon
files.title: Trolling Addon
files.desc: Speed Minecarts that stack speed on every powered rail, Skin Mockers that stalk and hunt players, Pure Sky camo blocks, the God Pickaxe and the chunk-erasing Chunk Miner.

files.name: Muffins_and_Blueberries.mcaddon
files.title: Muffins & Blueberries
files.desc: Bakeable snacks! Craft Blueberries from sweet berries + blue dye, fold paper and sugar into Muffin Wrappers, then bake Choc and Blueberry Muffins — each trades a touch of Weakness for bursts of Speed, Haste and Jump Boost.
